approved_command_preview: Patch chatgpt-apply-in.yml progressive reporting and commit the changed workflow file.
command: python chatgpt_staging/exec_scripts/patch_apply_in_progressive_reporting_001.py; git config user.name 'github-actions[bot]'; git config user.email '41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com'; git add .github/workflows/chatgpt-apply-in.yml; git diff --cached --quiet; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { git commit -m 'Add progressive reporting to chatgpt-apply-in [skip ci]'; git push } else { Write-Output 'No apply-in workflow changes to commit' }
